title: Normalization to HGNC/SO/HGVS/Mondo/NCIt + de-duplication
context: Normalization maps genes, variants, and disease terms to standard ontologies (HGNC/SO/HGVS/Mondo/NCIt) and de-duplicates evidence so cards are interoperable and non-redundant. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Implement normalization of ingested entities to HGNC/SO/HGVS/Mondo/NCIt identifiers plus de-duplication of equivalent assertions, validated on fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: Genes, variants, and disease terms normalized to HGNC/SO/HGVS/Mondo/NCIt identifiers
Equivalent assertions de-duplicated; normalization + de-duplication validated on fixtures
